# Checklist for Co-Mentors Supporting Provisionals Jan 21 25

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Checklist for Co-Mentors Working with Provisionals This checklist can be used by Co-Mentors who are supporting Provisional Volunteers through the co -mentoring requirements of the onboarding process. Before the Mentoring Session

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns legal and compliance, mentoring and advising, training and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- Checklist for Co-Mentors Working with Provisionals
- This checklist can be used by Co-Mentors who are supporting Provisional Volunteers through the co -mentoring requirements of the onboarding process.
- Before the Mentoring Session
- Arrive at the meeting early (whether it's virtual or in-person) so you are ready to welcome the client.
- During the Mentoring Session
- Use SLA TE to guide the mentoring session. Point the client to relevant tools and resources
- Schedule a follow-up session with the client before you finish the session.
